children.heading: Enforcement by Federal Trade Commission
children.label: a Enforcement by Federal Trade Commission
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), compliance with this subchapter shall be enforced by the Federal Trade Commission in the same manner and with the same power and authority as the Commission has under the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act [ et seq.] to enforce compliance with such Act.15 U.S.C. 1692

children.heading: Enforcement by other agencies in certain cases
children.label: b Enforcement by other agencies in certain cases
i
children.text: national banks, and Federal branches and Federal agencies of foreign banks, by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency;

children.label: ii
children.text: member banks of the Federal Reserve System (other than national banks), branches and agencies of foreign banks (other than Federal branches, Federal agencies, and insured State branches of foreign banks), commercial lending companies owned or controlled by foreign banks, and organizations operating under section 25 or 25A of the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq., 611 et seq.], by the Board;12 U.S.C. 601

children.label: iii
children.text: banks insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (other than members of the Federal Reserve System and national nonmember banks) and insured State branches of foreign banks, by the Board of Directors of the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation; and

children.label: iv
children.text: savings associations the deposits of which are insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation, by the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Federal Credit Union Act [ et seq.], by the Administrator of the National Credit Union Administration with respect to any Federal credit union.12 U.S.C. 1751

children.heading: Violations of this subchapter treated as violations of other laws
children.label: 2 Violations of this subchapter treated as violations of other laws
children.text: For the purpose of the exercise by any agency referred to in paragraph (1) of its powers under any Act referred to in that paragraph, a violation of this subchapter shall be deemed to be a violation of a requirement imposed under that Act. In addition to its powers under any provision of law specifically referred to in paragraph (1), each of the agencies referred to in that paragraph may exercise, for the purpose of enforcing compliance with this subchapter, any other authority conferred on such agency by law.
